name: Alex Morgan
title: Senior Property Advisor
bio: Alex has over 12 years of experience in UK residential property, specialising in first-time buyers and home movers. He has helped hundreds of families navigate the property buying process.
bullets: First-time buyer specialist|FCA-authorised mortgage adviser|Ex-high street bank manager

name: Sophie Clarke
title: Mortgage Specialist
bio: Sophie is a qualified mortgage adviser with expertise in complex mortgage applications including self-employed borrowers and those with imperfect credit histories. She holds the CeMAP qualification.
bullets: CeMAP qualified mortgage adviser|Whole-of-market access|Specialises in complex cases

name: James Okafor
title: Conveyancing Solicitor
bio: James is a qualified solicitor with 8 years of residential conveyancing experience. He is known for keeping clients informed at every step of the legal process.
bullets: Qualified solicitor (SRA regulated)|Residential & leasehold specialist|Average completion in 10 weeks

name: Lucy Pearce
title: Property Investment Consultant
bio: Lucy advises landlords and property investors on buy-to-let strategy, portfolio management and the UK rental market. She has personally invested in over 20 properties.
bullets: Buy-to-let portfolio specialist|ARLA Propertymark member|15 years investment experience
